meaning: n.(瑜伽教理中的)生命力(据认为蜷伏在尾椎部,当上升至脑时,即激发悟道)
examples: Practice of Kundalini yoga is the same as this.
Kundalini Yoga is a great way to relieve stress naturally.
This second revolution took the form of Kundalini awakening.
Thirteen-year-old Kerry Close of New Jersey then had to spell kundalini and Ursprache to win.
